name: foundation
goal: a fully working flat-file tracker driven entirely by hand, with no LLM anywhere.

name: the-reader
goal: make reading so good the agent never wants to open a raw file.

name: agent-skills
goal: wire it into Claude Code so a design discussion ends in clean command calls.

name: smart-ops
goal: the token-using layer — the only part that reaches for a model.

name: install-skills-polish
goal: close out two small PR #4 review items and one blank-page-friction fix.

name: issue-quality
goal: stop underspecified issues from being filed silently.

name: migration-tooling
goal: turn the manual migration playbook into something a human can review before and after it runs.

name: po-persona
goal: a single conversational entry point that routes natural requests to the right existing skill.

name: progress-log
goal: give a long-running doing issue a resumable history.
